context.profile.md:
Name: Jane Smith
Email: jane@example.com
Phone: 555-0100
Work Experience:
- Senior Analyst at DataCo: Built ETL pipelines, reduced query time 40%
context.narrative.md: Positioning: Data engineer who bridges analytics and engineering. Target: fast-growing B2B SaaS companies.
context.research.md: Acme Corp mission: Make data accessible to every business. Recent news: Launched AcmeData platform Q1 2026.
context.jd.md: Role: Senior Data Engineer. Top requirements: ETL expertise, Python, cross-team collaboration.
context.team.md: Hiring Manager: David Park, Director of Engineering

tests.expected_output: A cover letter under 400 words addressed to David Park, referencing AcmeData platform launch, quantified accomplishment from profile, narrative thread, and a call to discuss.
assertions: Letter is addressed to 'David Park' (from team.md)
Mentions AcmeData platform or Acme Corp mission (from research.md)
Includes at least one quantified accomplishment
Total word count is 400 or fewer
No filler phrases: 'I am passionate', 'great fit', 'excited to'
Opening sentence does not begin with 'I am writing to apply'
Appended to materials.md under acme-corp/senior-engineer/

context.profile.md:
Name: John Doe
Email: john@example.com
Phone: 555-0200
Work Experience:
- Head of Analytics at FinCo: Led 12-person team, 35% revenue growth
context.narrative.md: Positioning: Analytics leader focused on revenue. Seeks Director+ roles in financial services.
context.research.md: BigBank strategic priority: AI-driven credit decisioning. Announced $200M investment in data infrastructure.
context.jd.md: Role: VP of Analytics. Requirements: leadership, financial services experience, executive reporting.

tests.expected_output: Cover letter under 400 words addressed to 'Hiring Team' (no team.md), referencing BigBank AI credit decisioning initiative.
assertions: Addressed to 'Hiring Team' when team.md is absent
References BigBank's AI or data infrastructure initiative
Narrative thread connects analyst background to VP-level ambition
Appended to materials.md under bigbank/vp-analytics/
Signed with John Doe's name, email, and phone

context.profile.md:
Name: Alex Rivera
Email: alex@example.com
Phone: 555-0300
Work Experience:
- Software Engineer at MegaCo: Built microservices handling 10M requests/day
context.narrative.md: Positioning: Backend engineer who builds for scale. Seeking startup engineering roles.
context.research.md: StartupCo: Series B, 50-person team, recently open-sourced their core infrastructure library.
context.jd.md: Role: Senior Backend Engineer. Requirements: distributed systems, Go, Kubernetes.
context.team.md: Hiring Manager: Priya Nair, VP Engineering

tests.expected_output: Cover letter referencing StartupCo open-source initiative, distributed systems accomplishment, and the match between startup culture and the candidate's target.
assertions: References open-source library or Series B context from research.md
Includes distributed systems accomplishment with 10M requests/day metric
Addressed to Priya Nair
3–4 paragraphs total
Appended to materials.md under startupco/backend-engineer/

context.profile.md:
Name: Jamie Wong
Email: jamie@example.com
Phone: 555-0400
Work Experience:
- Principal Engineer at CloudCo (Feb 2019 – Present): Designed distributed caching system, 99.99% uptime, 200ms p99 latency
- Senior Engineer at WebCo (Jan 2016 – Jan 2019): Led migration of monolith to microservices
context.narrative.md: Positioning: Staff-level engineer who solves infrastructure problems at scale. Target: platform engineering at top-tier tech companies.
context.research.md: TechGiant engineering blog: Recently published post on their new distributed tracing system. Open-sourced their internal load balancing library.
context.jd.md: Role: Staff Engineer, Platform. Requirements: distributed systems design, technical leadership, cross-org influence.
context.team.md: Hiring Manager: Lin Zhang, Director of Platform Engineering

tests.expected_output: Cover letter under 400 words addressed to Lin Zhang, referencing TechGiant's open-source contributions, and connecting candidate's distributed systems work to the staff engineer scope.
assertions: Addressed to 'Lin Zhang'
References TechGiant's distributed tracing or open-source library
Mentions 99.99% uptime or 200ms p99 latency accomplishment
Connects individual contributor work to cross-org influence required for Staff Engineer
Appended to materials.md under techgiant/staff-engineer/
Word count 400 or fewer
